title: Cobblemon: Wildstone
description:
Explore the waystone wilds in Cobblemon: Wildstone.
 A cobblemon dedicated server and gym leader challenge
explore expanded biomes catch nearly every pokemon and decide your role in the world.
body:
A modded Cobblemon survival world built like a living Pokémon region. Build towns, train squads, explore rare biomes, and unlock fast travel across routes designed for adventure.

Explore the magic of Wildstone, a Cobblemon dedicated server and gym leader challenge. 



Explore expanded biomes, catch nearly every pokemon and decide your role in the world!

✅ Based on Cobblemon 1.7.2 (latest version)

🎮 ALL 1025 Pokémon available (no fakemons!)

🐉 All Legendaries, Mythicals & Ultra Beasts, many featuring custom summoning mechanics

💥 All 93 Mega Evolutions, including those from Pokémon Legends: Z-A and the Mega Dimension

🗺️ Kanto, Sinnoh and Wildstone regions with all Gym Leaders, Elite Four & Champions

🏛️ Exclusive custom Gyms and animated Gym Leaders with unique dialogues

🗼 Trainer Cove Central Hub for players to launch their adventure

✨ Legendary & Mythical Altars with custom summoning mechanics

🧭 Mapping system to explore your own unique way

🌟 Traditional shiny rate like classic games

💎 Earn XP by capturing wild Pokémon

🥇 Earn custom Badges and Trophies from official Gym Leader battles

🏘️ Custom villages with fully functional Pokémon Centers and Poké Marts

🔥 Wild Pokémon can attack your team

🐲 200+ Rideable Pokémon across all 9 Generations

🧱 Pokémon-inspired furniture blocks (statues, floors, tables, etc.)

🍛 Pokémon-themed food: boost friendship, catch rate, shiny odds, and more

🎣 3D Poké Rods, backpacks, and upgradable storage

📖 In-game Book to tweak settings anytime

🧰 Unique funiture, bridge, door, and music options to customize your base

💤 Use sleeping bags day or night without resetting spawnpoints

⚡ Battle mechanics: Mega Evolution, Dynamax, Gigamax, Terastallization, Z-Moves

🔎 Use FishingNav and PokeNav to see what you can catch in each area

💻 Access your PC from anywhere using a Smartphone

📸 Minimap & Waystones, customizable zoom

🧸 Tons of Pokémon dolls to collect

🚫 ALL Minecraft mobs, original mobs not in base game (you can disable them)

🎵 Dynamic soundtrack: custom music for menus & battle types

💽 Dynamic flight mechanics with immersive vehicles!

🪧 Integrated REI Support for Campfire Pot and Brewing Stand recipes

🔧 Many performance optimizations & quality-of-life enhancements

🌟 And much more, with regular updates & new content on the way!

🚫 ALL Minecraft mobs, original mobs not in base game (you can disable them)
